items.name_en: ❤️ B-style exquisite 'Title - Taylor Handbag', crafted with glossy two-tone leather and vintage plaid fabric, finished with exquisite three-button rivets. Can be carried by the top handle or worn on the shoulder with a detachable strap. 🎁 26 x 13.5 x 20cm

items.name_en: ❤️Classic Check Double Strap Bag, vintage yet playful, very popular💞. It stays ahead of trends for 10 years. Vintage and classic, full of Burberry's British style💖. Exquisitely crafted in an Italian workshop. Features Burberry Check, contrast stitching leather trim, cotton blend lining. Drawstring opening, leather top handle, front zip pocket. Imported calfskin💖. Dimensions 24✕13✕37cm

Premium
Small. Fendi Way is here~
Soft trapezoidal silhouette, natural opening, soft and casual lines, detachable shoulder strap for hand or shoulder carry, classic signature twist lock, card slot pocket inside, made of imported calf leather + suede, large capacity, versatile style, perfect for streetwear, high-end vibe~
Model: 368
size:36x13x27

items.name_cn:
Small Coffee Brown🔥🔥
New By The Way Selleria pillow bag is here. Natural grain calfskin feels incredibly soft and lightweight. The strap can be tied casually for a relaxed vibe. The silver metal keyring pendant allows for easy accessory matching. The interior features hand-stitched Roman calfskin embossing, simple yet premium. It transforms into a clutch with a light press, and storage is effortless!
Small: 20x9x12cm
Medium: 29x13x17cm

items.name_en: 🎶🥖Medium Baguette Bag. Calfskin with a grain texture is hand-stitched with large matching topstitching in the same color. Silver-finished metal hardware. Adorned with an FF clasp. The bag comes with a handle and a detachable shoulder strap, suitable for hand-carry or shoulder wear.
